items.name: DeepSeek-TUI
items.description: Coding agent for DeepSeek models that runs in your terminal

descriptions.zh: 在终端中运行的 DeepSeek 模型的编码代理
descriptions.en: Coding agent for DeepSeek models that runs in your terminal

items.name: InsForge
items.description: InsForge is a Postgres-based backend with auth, storage, compute, hosting, and AI gateway. Built for coding agents.

descriptions.zh: InsForge 是一个基于 Postgres 的后端，具有身份验证、存储、计算、托管和 AI 网关。专为编码代理而设计。
descriptions.en: InsForge is a Postgres-based backend with auth, storage, compute, hosting, and AI gateway. Built for coding agents.

items.name: local-deep-research
items.description: ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

descriptions.zh: SimpleQA 上约为 95%（例如 3090 上的 Qwen3.6-27B）。支持所有本地和云 LLM（llama.cpp、Ollama、Google...）。 10 多个搜索引擎 - arXiv、PubMed、您的私人文档。一切都是本地和加密的。
descriptions.en: ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

items.name: agent-skills
items.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

descriptions.zh: AI 编码代理的生产级工程技能。
descriptions.en: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
